history_policy.scope: Task-agnostic public Click history visible before M5 task execution.

summary: Recent public Click work repeatedly changes option default display, ParameterSource ordering, and default_map behavior; treat source tracking as part of semantics, not metadata.
CliRunner changes often involve compatibility with standard Python streams and filesystem or environment isolation; verify restoration and explicit stream arguments.
Documentation migrations and formatting cleanups are common around behavior changes; do not infer behavior solely from docs-only anchors.
Tests have been moving toward randomized and parallel-friendly behavior; avoid changes that rely on global state persisting across invocations.
Public source, docs, and tests are acceptable task-agnostic context; task target commits, hidden verifier material, reference patches, and candidate outputs remain forbidden.
